message:
feat(extract): add ApiKeyQuery and ApiKeyCookie extractors

Implement API key extraction from query parameters and cookies:

- ApiKeyQuery: Extract API key from configurable query param (default: api_key)
- ApiKeyCookie: Extract API key from configurable cookie (default: api_key)
- Both include SecureCompare for timing-safe validation
- Both return 401 Unauthorized with JSON body on missing/empty key
- Complete test coverage (17 tests for query, 15 for cookie)

Closes fastapi_rust-hxa, fastapi_rust-968

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-    BasicAuthError, BearerToken, BearerTokenError, ContentType, Cookie, CookieExtractError,
-    CookieName, CookiePrefix, CookiePrefixError, CsrfTokenCookie, DEFAULT_API_KEY_HEADER,
+    Accept, ApiKeyCookie, ApiKeyCookieConfig, ApiKeyCookieError, ApiKeyHeader, ApiKeyHeaderConfig,
+    ApiKeyHeaderError, ApiKeyQuery, ApiKeyQueryConfig, ApiKeyQueryError, AppState, Authorization,
